abstract: Our city is welcoming the GraphQL Conference! We gather the local community at not one, but two amazing meetups. Pick one based on what technocal content you want to see and learn about. The GraphQL SF 12: Generative AI Night hosted at GitHub is hosted by GitHub and the topics is the AI for UX. And GraphQL SF Meetup: September Edition, colocated with the conference, features several talks, from federated API, to web3, to Rust full-stack GraphQL solutions. If you like GraphQL as middleware, make sure to attend Scale By the Bay, the main independent conference of Bay Area meetups, that pioneered GraphQL middleware in 2016
title: GraphQLConf Meetups!
